name: dark-editorial
description: 暗黑极简 Editorial 风格 - 深色背景、白色点阵、线框插画、精致知识分子美学
prompt_template: Dark editorial design, New York Times style, black background {background} with white dot grid pattern, minimalist line art illustration, white outline wireframe, {palette} accent, dramatic negative space, clean serif typography, sophisticated intellectual aesthetic, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: bright background, colorful, gradients, drop shadows, 3D, casual, playful, sans-serif, brutalist
